message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first distributed persistence sweep (tick 277)

12-site batch migrating ambient storage calls in the distributed-agent
persistence path in `frankenterm/main.rs` to `_with_cx` siblings.

**`distributed_persist_payload` (7 sites, shared `persist_cx`):**

- Two `get_pane_with_cx(&persist_cx, remote_pane_id)` calls (L12771
  PaneDelta-receive + L12853 in an adjacent payload branch) via
  `replace_all`
- Two `record_gap_with_cx(&persist_cx, remote_pane_id, &reason)` calls
  (L12787 + L12872) via `replace_all` (PaneDelta + neighbor payload)
- `record_event_with_cx(&persist_cx, stored_event)` for the
  detection-event path
- (Plus one minor redundancy that the replace_all picked up)

Shared `persist_cx` binding declared once at top of the fn covers all
7 sites (shared-cx pattern from tick 247).

**`distributed_persist_pane_meta` (1 site, local `meta_cx`):**

- `get_pane_with_cx(&meta_cx, remote_pane_id)` to determine `is_new`
  before upsert. Declared locally since the fn doesn't share scope
  with `distributed_persist_payload`.

**`distributed_agent_should_skip_remote_pane` (1 site, local `check_cx`):**

- `get_pane_with_cx(&check_cx, pane_id)` to look up the pane classification
  during event routing.

**Envelope enrich paths (2 sites, local `env_cx`, replace_all):**

- Inside two PaneMeta envelope enrichment blocks (PaneDiscovered + PatternDetected
  event handlers that upgrade to stored PaneMeta with storage-resident fields):
  `get_pane_with_cx(&env_cx, meta.pane_id)`

**Semantic anomaly segment fetch (1 site, local `seg_cx`):**

- `get_segments_with_cx(&seg_cx, pane_id, limit)` in the
  `semantic-search` feature-gated path that loads recent segments for
  anomaly detection.

All sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`.
The distributed persistence code runs in a long-running aggregator
receive loop, so cx-cancel propagates from the outer TLS stream task
into every storage write the receive handler triggers.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 91 (187-277).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 165 sites (153 before + 12).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
